name: 14q32_ARMC9_SD
description: 14q32.12 region containing ARMC9, AHNAK2-paralog footprint, and TRMT61A. Small intra-chromosomal SDs (5-15 kb at 93-96% identity) flank ARMC9 and contribute to rare intragenic Joubert-syndrome alleles. Distinct from the imprinted 14q32.2 DLK1/MEG3 domain ~10 Mb further telomeric.

architecture.internal_structure: 5-15 kb SD pairs at 93-96% identity flanking ARMC9; AHNAK2 paralog footprint embedded.
